name: THE MASCOT. PLATONIC
description:
What family role did you have in your childhood?

Tw: Self-harm, religious trauma, dysfunctional family, violence, addiction, etc.

Scenario: after you had a big fight with your parents and you lock yourself in your room, your brother tries to comfort you.

The mascot

The family distraction from the toxic and violent environment, the child who assumes the duty of comfort and distract others with jokes and pranks leaving aside their own emotional stability and their own identity. broken sense of self.

FINALLYYYYYYY, the last bot of this family (and the first serie that i actually finish omfg) I'm glad to complete it but at the same time I feel bad not writing about them anymore and at the same time I feel free will again to write whatever I want (jkkk). I have many ideas for Christmas bots. ANYWAYSSS, The whole family is in my profile (the hero, the scapegoat and the lost child) I'm too lazy to put the links here, sorry 🙏🙏

For anyone who is a little lost and needs context:

Family roles in childhood are behaviors that children who grow up in toxic or unhealthy environments stick on to cope with and survive trauma. Although they are obviously not healthy defense mechanisms and can do more harm than they fix.

He's so alex G core (I was dying for say it). This was supposed to be published yesterday but I fell asleep looking for the banners lmao☹️

ENJOYY
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
